name: Sicilian Twist Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the first five ingredients (dry ingredients).
2. Gradually add warm water until a soft dough forms.
3. Add olive oil and mix well.
4. Turn out onto a floured board and knead for 6 minutes.
5. Divide dough into 6 equal parts.
6. Roll out each part with hands to form 6 ropes.
7. Form the ropes into 2 braids using 3 ropes each.
8. Place on aluminum foil-lined pan, making diagonal cuts.
9. Brush with egg white wash and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
10. Let rise for at least one hour.
11. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 15-20 minutes.
12. Cool on a wire rack.
